intentSynonyms: react a to post in facebook
react to a facebook post in facebook
description: Add or remove a reaction on a Facebook post. Requires the feedback_id from get_user_posts. Set reaction to "NONE" to remove an existing reaction. Available reactions: LIKE, LOVE, HAHA, WOW, SAD, ANGRY.

feedback_id.description: Feedback ID of the post (from get_user_posts)

reaction.description: Reaction type: LIKE, LOVE, HAHA, WOW, SAD, ANGRY, or NONE to remove
